description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a straight, cylindrical wooden handle with a natural brown finish and a robust, dark metal head. The axe head is wedge-shaped, with a single broad cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. The blade is securely mounted to the handle using a traditional sleeve fit, with the metal head enveloping the end of the handle. The wood grain is visible along the length of the handle, and the metal head has a matte, slightly rough texture. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or branding on either the handle or the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, suggesting it is intended for practical use in urban maintenance, gardening, or emergency scenarios.
description: A utilitarian hand axe with a straight wooden handle and a wedge-shaped dark metal blade, designed for practical chopping or splitting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the thickness of the blade and the secure mounting of the head to the handle.
description_view_2: Low side view emphasizing the blade's edge profile and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_3: Perspective from the handle end, showing the alignment of the blade and the round cross-section of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a smooth finish, no visible grip features, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a flat poll, no beard, and a straight cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional sleeve fit with the blade head enveloping the end of the handle.
